---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing tool or the platform
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What tool or area does this improve?
<!-- e.g. Magic PDF, overall UI, search, performance -->

## Describe the feature
<!-- Clear description of what you want -->

## Why is this valuable?
<!-- Who benefits and how? -->

## Privacy Impact
<!-- Does this feature require any data to leave the browser? If yes, it likely won't be accepted. -->

## Alternatives you've considered
<!-- Any other ways to solve the problem? -->

## Additional context
<!-- Screenshots, examples from other tools, etc. -->
